hero.subtitle: Every day is a new opportunity to change your life!
hero.description: Our personalized training plans will help you raise awareness about the importance of maintaining a healthy weight and adopting a balanced lifestyle, setting achievable goals and objectives.

services.title: Expertise You Can Trust
services.description: With over 10 years of experience in the fitness industry, I am dedicated to helping you achieve your goals through personalized training and nutrition guidance.

weight_loss.title: Weight Loss
weight_loss.description: Develop a customized plan to help you lose weight safely and sustainably.

muscle_building.title: Muscle Building
muscle_building.description: Gain lean muscle mass through targeted strength training and nutrition.

injury_prevention.title: Injury Prevention
injury_prevention.description: Learn proper form and technique to avoid injuries and stay active.

about.content_1: Since I was a child, by using food as an escape route, I accumulated weight until I reached 160 kg. I believed that a diet was the solution and I looked for the perfect combination of foods that would magically make me lose weight.
about.content_2: I started my journey on the television program “Cuestión de Peso” and managed to lose 50 kg. However, after the program, I gained weight again because the change I had achieved was only physical, not mental. Over time, I understood that true transformation goes far beyond a simple before and after photo.
about.content_3: Today, I can say that I transformed myself from a place of peace with food and with my body, leaving behind the struggle and suffering. This path not only included self-knowledge, but also therapy, which allowed me to truly heal and build a healthier and more loving relationship with myself.
about.title2: Transform Your Life with 'Weigh Less, Live More'
about.content2: At 'Weigh Less, Live More,' we believe that the path to a healthier life is not just about losing weight but gaining wellness, energy, and confidence. Our personalized training program is designed to fit your needs, goals, and lifestyle. With a holistic approach to physical and mental health, we offer effective exercise plans, nutritional guidance, and ongoing support to help you achieve your goals safely and sustainably. Join us and discover how you can live a fuller, more active, and happier life.

testimonials.title: What My Clients Say
testimonials.description: Hear from real clients who have transformed their lives with my guidance and support.

jessica_davis.name: Jessica Davis
jessica_davis.quote: Working with this trainer has been life-changing. They created a plan that fit my lifestyle and helped me reach my goals.

michael_roberts.name: Michael Roberts
michael_roberts.quote: I was struggling to build muscle, but this trainer designed a program that helped me pack on lean mass without any injuries.

sarah_kim.name: Sarah Kim
sarah_kim.quote: I was looking to improve my overall fitness, and this trainer created a well-rounded program that has made a huge difference in my energy and strength.
